extraction.one_line_summary: MILESIN Lorenzo and DSM won the TTT starting second on course in pitch-black rain conditions, holding off Movistar by 0.05 seconds to fifth rider.
tactical_patterns: DSM starting second of 22 teams set unbeatable time in optimal twilight window before pitch-black darkness descended.
Movistar lost by 0.05s to fifth rider, suggesting final sprint coordination cost them leader's jersey.
Multiple teams crashed in identical corner sequence near finish, indicating specific technical feature not broadcast warnings.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: finished 6s down, gestured furiously at cameras about darkness/conditions indicating mental fragility under adverse circumstances
rider_signals.MAS Enrique: positive: sprinted desperately for fifth rider time at line showing Movistar prioritized stage win over safety
rider_signals.HOFSTETTER Hugo: negative: attempted inside pass on own teammate in corner causing crash, revealing poor TTT discipline
